# Contributing

Use one focused pull request per traceability objective. Reference the product requirement and decision IDs, include screenshots for visible states, test loading/empty/error/stale/offline/unauthorized behavior, and update `CHANGELOG.md`.

Before review, run lint, strict type checking, tests, Expo validation, API compatibility, and documentation checks. Never expose tokens to forked pull requests or weaken stale/offline mutation protections to simplify UI code.
